post.title: Tools That Return Attention
post.intent_statement: Define a good tool as one that returns the reader's attention rather than consuming it.
post.central_question: What is the right thing to measure a tool by?
post.core_insight: Measure a tool by the attention it gives back, not the time it captures.
post.body_html:
An instrument is honest about what it is for. It points your attention and then gets out of the way.

Engagement is the wrong target. Returned attention is the right one.

A reader should leave with more clarity than they arrived with.
